Script.name: icesus.core
Script.script:
-- Icesus Mudlet package — core -- v0.2.1 • https://github.com/Icesus-mud/mudlet-package -- -- One Lua script defines the whole package. Everything lives under the -- global `icesus` table. On (re)load the previous instance is torn down -- and a fresh one installed, so editing this script and saving in -- Mudlet's IDE replaces the running HUD cleanly. icesus = icesus or {} icesus.version = "0.2.1" -- Hot-reload teardown. if type(icesus.teardown) == "function" then pcall(icesus.teardown) end -- ============================================================= -- Config — tweak in your private session, or PR upstream defaults. -- ============================================================= icesus.config = { borderRight = 320, -- right column width (px) borderBottom = 36, -- vitals row height (px) channelLines = 500, channelTimes = true, } -- ============================================================= -- Internal state. -- ============================================================= icesus.state = { vitals = { hp=0, hpmax=0, sp=0, spmax=0, ep=0, epmax=0 }, enemies = {}, effects = {}, momentum = "", specialMomentum = "", casting = nil, -- { spell, progress, cps } when active inCombat = false, } icesus.hud = nil icesus.handlers = {} -- ============================================================= -- Shape buckets — must match adm/daemons/gmcp_d.c:411-427. -- The server quantizes enemy HP to these tiers; the client -- should not pretend to know more. -- ============================================================= icesus.shapeColors = { [100] = "#22c55e", [99] = "#4ade80", [90] = "#a3e635", [80] = "#d9f99d", [70] = "#facc15", [60] = "#f59e0b", [50] = "#fb923c", [40] = "#f97316", [30] = "#ef4444", [20] = "#dc2626", [10] = "#b91c1c", [5] = "#7f1d1d", } local function shapeColor(pct) for _, b in ipairs({100, 99, 90, 80, 70, 60, 50, 40, 30, 20, 10, 5}) do if pct >= b then return icesus.shapeColors[b] end end return icesus.shapeColors[5] end local function htmlEscape(s) return (tostring(s or ""):gsub("[<>&]", { ["<"] = "<", [">"] = ">", ["&"] = "&" })) end -- ============================================================= -- HUD construction. -- ============================================================= function icesus.setupHUD() if icesus.hud then return end icesus.hud = {} local R = icesus.config.borderRight local B = icesus.config.borderBottom setBorderRight(R) setBorderBottom(B) -- ----- bottom: vitals gauges (don't extend under the right column) ----- icesus.hud.bottom = Geyser.HBox:new({ name = "icesus.bottom", x = 0, y = "-" .. B, width = "100%-" .. R, height = B, }) local function makeGauge(key, label, fill) local g = Geyser.Gauge:new({ name = "icesus." .. key }, icesus.hud.bottom) g.front:setStyleSheet(string.format( "background-color: %s; border: 1px solid #111; border-radius: 2px;", fill)) g.back:setStyleSheet( "background-color: #1a1a1a; border: 1px solid #111; border-radius: 2px;") g.text:setStyleSheet([[ color: #fff; font-family: "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace; font-size: 10pt; qproperty-alignment: 'AlignCenter'; ]]) g:setValue(0, 1, label) return g end icesus.hud.hp = makeGauge("hp", "HP", "#16a34a") icesus.hud.sp = makeGauge("sp", "SP", "#2563eb") icesus.hud.ep = makeGauge("ep", "EP", "#a855f7") -- ----- right column: ONE container, every panel absolute-positioned. -- Nested HBox/VBox inside a Container don't honour x/y in some Mudlet -- versions, so the previous nested layout had the bottom panel -- overlapping the top panel. Flat layout removes that footgun. icesus.hud.right = Geyser.Container:new({ name = "icesus.right", x = "-" .. R, y = 0, width = R, height = "100%-" .. B, }) -- Geometry constants for the right column. local PAD = 4 local BTN_H = 28 local CAST_H = 24 local EFFECTS_H = 24 local ENEMY_H = 220 local btnY = PAD -- 4 local castY = btnY + BTN_H + PAD -- 36 local effectsY = castY + CAST_H + PAD -- 64 local enemyY = effectsY + EFFECTS_H + PAD -- 92 local channelsY = enemyY + ENEMY_H + PAD -- 316 -- Two side-by-side momentum buttons, absolutely positioned. local btnW = math.floor((R - PAD * 3) / 2) -- e.g. 156 local function makeMomentumBtn(key, x) local btn = Geyser.Label:new({ name = "icesus." .. key, x = x, y = btnY, width = btnW, height = BTN_H, }, icesus.hud.right) btn:setStyleSheet([[ background-color: #1a1a1a; color: #555; border: 1px solid #2a2a2a; border-radius: 4px; font-family: "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace; font-size: 10pt; qproperty-alignment: 'AlignCenter'; ]]) btn:echo([[
—
]]) return btn end icesus.hud.momentumBtn = makeMomentumBtn("momentumBtn", PAD) icesus.hud.specialMomentumBtn = makeMomentumBtn("specialMomentumBtn", PAD * 2 + btnW) -- Closures: the icesus.useMomentum etc. functions are defined later -- in this file. Looking them up at click-time (not now) lets the -- order in this script not matter. icesus.hud.momentumBtn:setClickCallback(function() icesus.useMomentum() end) icesus.hud.specialMomentumBtn:setClickCallback(function() icesus.useSpecialMomentum() end) -- Cast bar. icesus.hud.castGauge = Geyser.Gauge:new({ name = "icesus.castGauge", x = PAD, y = castY, width = R - PAD * 2, height = CAST_H, }, icesus.hud.right) icesus.hud.castGauge.front:setStyleSheet( "background-color: #7c3aed; border: 1px solid #111; border-radius: 2px;") icesus.hud.castGauge.back:setStyleSheet( "background-color: #1a1a1a; border: 1px solid #111; border-radius: 2px;") icesus.hud.castGauge.text:setStyleSheet([[ color: #fff; font-family: "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace; font-size: 9pt; qproperty-alignment: 'AlignCenter'; ]]) icesus.hud.castGauge:setValue(0, 1, "—") -- Status effects strip. icesus.hud.effectsRow = Geyser.Label:new({ name = "icesus.effectsRow", x = PAD, y = effectsY, width = R - PAD * 2, height = EFFECTS_H, }, icesus.hud.right) icesus.hud.effectsRow:setStyleSheet([[ background-color: #0d0d0d; color: #888; border: 1px solid #1a1a1a; border-radius: 3px; font-family: "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace; font-size: 9pt; qproperty-alignment: 'AlignCenter'; ]]) icesus.hud.effectsRow:echo( [[
no effects
]]) -- Enemy panel — fixed height block. icesus.hud.enemyLabel = Geyser.Label:new({ name = "icesus.enemyLabel", x = 0, y = enemyY, width = "100%", height = ENEMY_H, }, icesus.hud.right) icesus.hud.enemyLabel:setStyleSheet([[ background-color: #1a1a1a; color: #ddd; border: 1px solid #2a2a2a; font-family: "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace; font-size: 10pt; qproperty-alignment: 'AlignTop'; ]]) icesus.hud.enemyLabel:echo( [[
no targets
]]) -- Channels — fills the rest of the right column. icesus.hud.channels = Geyser.MiniConsole:new({ name = "icesus.channels", x = 0, y = channelsY, width = "100%", height = "100%-" .. channelsY, autoWrap = true, fontSize = 10, color = "#0d0d0d", }, icesus.hud.right) icesus.hud.channels:setBufferSize(icesus.config.channelLines, icesus.config.channelLines) icesus.hud.channels:cecho("--- Icesus channels (Comm.Channel) ---\n") end function icesus.teardownHUD() if not icesus.hud then return end for _, w in pairs(icesus.hud) do if w and type(w.hide) == "function" then pcall(function() w:hide() end) end end icesus.hud = nil setBorderSizes(0, 0, 0, 0) end -- ============================================================= -- Render. -- ============================================================= function icesus.refreshGauges() if not icesus.hud then return end local s = icesus.state.vitals local function setG(g, cur, max, label) if not g then return end local m = math.max(max, 1) g:setValue(math.min(math.max(cur, 0), m), m, string.format("%s %d/%d", label, cur, max)) end setG(icesus.hud.hp, s.hp, s.hpmax, "HP") setG(icesus.hud.sp, s.sp, s.spmax, "SP") setG(icesus.hud.ep, s.ep, s.epmax, "EP") end function icesus.refreshEnemies() if not icesus.hud or not icesus.hud.enemyLabel then return end local enemies = icesus.state.enemies if #enemies == 0 then icesus.hud.enemyLabel:echo( [[
no targets
]]) return end local rows = { [[]] } for _, e in ipairs(enemies) do local pct = tonumber(e.hp) or 0 local col = shapeColor(pct) local name = htmlEscape(e.name) local bar = string.rep("█", math.floor(pct / 10)) -- █ blocks table.insert(rows, string.format( [[]] .. [[]] .. [[]] .. [[]], name, col, bar, pct, htmlEscape(e.shape))) end table.insert(rows, "
%s%s%d%%
%s
") icesus.hud.enemyLabel:echo(table.concat(rows)) end function icesus.refreshMomentum() if not icesus.hud then return end local function paint(btn, val, label, color) if not btn then return end if val and val ~= "" then btn:setStyleSheet(string.format([[ background-color: %s; color: #fff; border: 1px solid %s; border-radius: 4px; font-family: "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace; font-size: 10pt; qproperty-alignment: 'AlignCenter'; ]], color, color)) btn:echo(string.format( [[
%s %s
]], label, htmlEscape(val))) else btn:setStyleSheet([[ background-color: #1a1a1a; color: #555; border: 1px solid #2a2a2a; border-radius: 4px; font-family: "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace; font-size: 10pt; qproperty-alignment: 'AlignCenter'; ]]) btn:echo([[
—
]]) end end paint(icesus.hud.momentumBtn, icesus.state.momentum, "use", "#0891b2") paint(icesus.hud.specialMomentumBtn, icesus.state.specialMomentum, "use", "#c026d3") end function icesus.refreshCasting() if not icesus.hud or not icesus.hud.castGauge then return end local c = icesus.state.casting if not c then icesus.hud.castGauge:setValue(0, 1, "—") return end local total = math.max(tonumber(c.cps) or 1, 1) local prog = math.min(math.max(tonumber(c.progress) or 0, 0), total) icesus.hud.castGauge:setValue(prog, total, "casting " .. (c.spell or "")) end function icesus.refreshEffects() if not icesus.hud or not icesus.hud.effectsRow then return end local fx = icesus.state.effects if not fx or #fx == 0 then icesus.hud.effectsRow:echo( [[
no effects
]]) return end local parts = { [[
]] } for _, e in ipairs(fx) do table.insert(parts, string.format( [[%s]], htmlEscape(e):upper())) end table.insert(parts, [[
]]) icesus.hud.effectsRow:echo(table.concat(parts)) end -- ============================================================= -- GMCP handlers. -- Field names must match adm/daemons/gmcp_d.c. -- Char.Vitals & Char.Maxstats use: hp, mana, moves, psp, maxhp, -- maxmana, maxmoves, maxpsp. -- ============================================================= function icesus.onVitals() local v = gmcp.Char and gmcp.Char.Vitals if not v then return end local s = icesus.state.vitals s.hp = tonumber(v.hp) or s.hp s.sp = tonumber(v.mana) or s.sp s.ep = tonumber(v.moves) or s.ep s.hpmax = tonumber(v.maxhp) or s.hpmax s.spmax = tonumber(v.maxmana) or s.spmax s.epmax = tonumber(v.maxmoves) or s.epmax icesus.refreshGauges() end function icesus.onMaxstats() local v = gmcp.Char and gmcp.Char.Maxstats if not v then return end local s = icesus.state.vitals s.hpmax = tonumber(v.maxhp) or s.hpmax s.spmax = tonumber(v.maxmana) or s.spmax s.epmax = tonumber(v.maxmoves) or s.epmax icesus.refreshGauges() end function icesus.onStatus() local s = gmcp.Char and gmcp.Char.Status if not s then return end -- enemies icesus.state.enemies = {} if type(s.enemies) == "table" and s.enemies[1] then for _, e in ipairs(s.enemies) do table.insert(icesus.state.enemies, { name = e.name or "?", hp = tonumber(e.hp) or 0, shape = e.shape or "", }) end elseif s.enemy and s.enemy ~= "" then table.insert(icesus.state.enemies, { name = s.enemy, hp = tonumber(s.enemypct) or 0, shape = "", }) end icesus.state.inCombat = (s.state == "combat") icesus.refreshEnemies() -- momentum icesus.state.momentum = s.momentum or "" icesus.state.specialMomentum = s.special_momentum or "" icesus.refreshMomentum() -- effects icesus.state.effects = (type(s.effects) == "table") and s.effects or {} icesus.refreshEffects() end function icesus.onCasting() local c = gmcp.Char and gmcp.Char.Casting if not c then return end if c.active == 1 or c.active == true then icesus.state.casting = { spell = c.spell or "", progress = tonumber(c.progress) or 0, cps = tonumber(c.cps) or 1, } else icesus.state.casting = nil end icesus.refreshCasting() end function icesus.onEnemyDeath() local d = gmcp.Char and gmcp.Char.EnemyDeath if not d or not d.name then return end local kept = {} for _, e in ipairs(icesus.state.enemies) do if e.name ~= d.name then table.insert(kept, e) end end icesus.state.enemies = kept icesus.refreshEnemies() end function icesus.onChannel() local c = gmcp.Comm and gmcp.Comm.Channel if not c or not icesus.hud or not icesus.hud.channels then return end local mc = icesus.hud.channels local time = icesus.config.channelTimes and (os.date("%H:%M ")) or "" local chan = c.chan or "?" local who = c.player or "" local msg = c.msg or "" if who ~= "" then mc:cecho(string.format("%s[%s] %s: %s\n", time, chan, who, msg)) else mc:cecho(string.format("%s[%s] %s\n", time, chan, msg)) end end -- ============================================================= -- Click handlers (must be globals — Geyser passes them as strings). -- ============================================================= function icesus.useMomentum() if icesus.state.momentum and icesus.state.momentum ~= "" then send("use " .. icesus.state.momentum) end end function icesus.useSpecialMomentum() if icesus.state.specialMomentum and icesus.state.specialMomentum ~= "" then send("use " .. icesus.state.specialMomentum) end end -- ============================================================= -- GMCP subscription. -- Sending Core.Supports.Set triggers send_all() server-side, so a -- fresh dump of every package arrives immediately. We also send -- Core.Hello so the server can identify us as Mudlet. -- ============================================================= function icesus.subscribeGMCP() sendGMCP('Core.Hello { "client": "Mudlet", "version": "' .. icesus.version .. '" }') sendGMCP('Core.Supports.Set ["Char 1", "Char.Vitals 1", "Comm 1", "Room 1"]') end -- ============================================================= -- Install / uninstall. -- ============================================================= local function reg(event, fn) table.insert(icesus.handlers, registerAnonymousEventHandler(event, fn)) end function icesus.install() icesus.uninstall() -- idempotent icesus.setupHUD() reg("gmcp.Char.Vitals", icesus.onVitals) reg("gmcp.Char.Maxstats", icesus.onMaxstats) reg("gmcp.Char.Status", icesus.onStatus) reg("gmcp.Char.Casting", icesus.onCasting) reg("gmcp.Char.EnemyDeath", icesus.onEnemyDeath) reg("gmcp.Comm.Channel", icesus.onChannel) reg("sysConnectionEvent", icesus.subscribeGMCP) reg("sysExitEvent", icesus.uninstall) if isConnected and isConnected() then icesus.subscribeGMCP() end cecho("\nIcesus package v" .. icesus.version .. " ready. " .. "(vitals, momentum, casting, effects, enemies, channels)\n") end function icesus.uninstall() if icesus.handlers then for _, h in ipairs(icesus.handlers) do pcall(killAnonymousEventHandler, h) end icesus.handlers = {} end icesus.teardownHUD() end icesus.teardown = icesus.uninstall icesus.install()
